UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2022 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PROVE UP HEARING - CONTINUED TO MAR-22-2022 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 FOR FURTHER DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. ARTHUR J. LIU, ESQ. APPEARED WITH PLAINTIFF LI ZHI LIAO, WHO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH, BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. ANGEL LEI, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH, BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU ASSISTED BOTH MS. LIAO AND MS. LEI DURING THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDINGS. THE COURT RECEIVED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS 1 THROUGH 8 AT 8:57 A.M. TODAY, VIA EMAIL. ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH ANY DOCUMENTATION IN SUPPORT OF THE $4,000.00 REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES. COUNSEL IS INSTRUCTED THAT ANY ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF WANTS THE COURT TO REVIEW, INCLUDING ANY DOCUMENTATION IN SUPPORT OF THE ATTORNEY FEES REQUEST, SHALL BE PROVIDED TO THE COURT AT LEAST TWO WEEKS PRIOR TO THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. A CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BY PROVIDED TO MS. LIAO TO ASSIST HER AT THE MARCH 22ND HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT(S) WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 10:04 A.M. AND CONCLUDING AT 10:15 A.M. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Nelson Liang.
Dept. 514. Visiting Judge: Judith S. Craddick. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:23 a.m.

Arthur J. Liu, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Li Zhi Liao, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Liu and Ms. Liao appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Court Certified Cantonese speaking interpreter Edward Chu assisted Ms. Liao during today's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Nelson Liang.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on February 8, 2021, and personally served on defendant Nelson Liang on March 10, 2021.
Default as to defendant Nelson Liang was entered on July 19, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on Juy 19, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Li Zhi Liao, and against the defaulted defendant Nelson Liang, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,400.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,233.33.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - 457.00.

Total - $30,090.33.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 9:40 a.m.
